subcodes.first_line: God, exalted is He, saith: "Lord of the two Easts and Lord of the two Wests," unto the end of the verse. O thou who gazest upon the Most Luminous Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قال الله تعالی رب المشرقین و رب المغربین الی آخر الایه یا ایها الناظر الی الجمال الأنور
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Manifestation of God as sun, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul
